nodes.label: LTM Energy Group
nodes.summary: Energy company named LTM Energy Group with tagline 'Managed Energy Solutions'. Logo features dark olive/forest green color scheme with a red Greek eta (η) symbol in a rounded square icon.

nodes.label: LTM Energy Group Logo
nodes.summary: Corporate logo image: rounded square icon containing a red cursive Greek letter eta (η) on white background with green metallic border, followed by bold dark green 'LTM' wordmark, 'ENERGY GROUP' subtitle, and a dark green banner reading 'MANAGED ENERGY SOLUTIONS' in white uppercase text.

nodes.label: Managed Energy Solutions
nodes.summary: LTM Energy Group's tagline displayed in a dark green banner: 'MANAGED ENERGY SOLUTIONS'

nodes.label: Eta (η) Symbol
nodes.summary: Red cursive Greek letter eta (η) inside a rounded square with green metallic border. Eta (η) commonly denotes efficiency in engineering/energy contexts.
